name: @pangaea/ds-tokens
description: Pangaea design tokens — the two-hex blue-on-white system (light + dark), self-hosted fonts, and a Tailwind v4 @theme preset. Ported verbatim from pangaea.id DESIGN.md.

scripts.build: sass src/tokens.scss dist/tokens.css --no-source-map --style=expanded && cp src/theme.css dist/theme.css && cp src/fonts.css dist/fonts.css && mkdir -p dist/fonts && cp fonts/*.woff2 dist/fonts/
